scripts.dev: lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3000,3020,3021 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:backend: lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev:frontend: lsof -ti:3000,3020,3021 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev --prefix frontend
